title: sarcopodium elongatum
intro: Sarcopodium elongatum, also known as the "Viper's Bugloss", is a plant species in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating and help to bring out toxins. The health benefits of Sarcopodium elongatum include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Sarcopodium elongatum can be found in various forms, including infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
